{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320180622C00671A97E7BEBE1EF66"}"},"total":405},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7389260415328518937","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，女主非常符合当代社畜心态。而且里面对咱大种花的设定很好。很喜欢，女主的性格很有看头。很奈斯。目前没有雷点。希望大大继续加油，希望女主是无cp。小日子的刀配不上女主"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1720448107,"group_id":"7371521974931033113","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Exu/yP7Ewk+Ortqw3n9YKdO7lemQLmNazxpfkmdrAw","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2731629170930525","user_name":"荼北北"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2731629170930525","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7371521974931033113","book_info":{"abstract":"（无CP，主刀剑乱舞，咒回，带一点美妙天堂，文野，名柯）
我以为是甜蜜少女漫开局，结果是“开门杀”地狱副本！
事前：上班精神哪有正常的？接受邀请成为审神者，事少钱多的诱惑谁能抵挡，反正我抵不住。这个婶婶，我先当为敬！
事后：烦请后来人认真思考，被坑真的就是一下子的事，话说，这个坑也太深了吧，还能不能爬上去啊（叹气大叫)
没错，我精神状态不正常，谁家审神者又当又当又当啊
啊，原来是我
刀剑乱舞当婶婶，黑暗本丸少不了
美妙天堂当偶像，唱跳rap算了吧
咒术回战当牛马，又要灭咒灵还要给同期上课（微笑）
回过头来再想想自己的最初目标
钱是没挣到的，债是一屁股的
哈哈哈，洗了蒜啦！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oea4a728ce01f8c2945b94734e0143285~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"爱吃芥末凉拌菜的宫可","author_id":"","book_id":"7371521974931033113","book_name":"综漫进入黑暗本丸后，我被读心了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3283人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7371522048838877721","read_count":"3283","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"387857"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"186","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,无CP,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oea4a728ce01f8c2945b94734e0143285~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779185182&x-signature=44x1eZWuPOi2NSyL6qB3tGmzOsE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1900429891088766","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"64"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320180622C00671A97E7BEBE1EF66"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1
